ab: msqun cu musa mcisan tanux ki yaya mu.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: mtasiq ru blaq kayal nya saniq coni, ini kltu ini kilux kayal nya, sqblaq calay qsliq behuy qani.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: mtama cami roq ru maniq cami menpaw, lhol calay he sbu’ cami nya wagi qani.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

ab: babaw knryax lga, mtalah qa kayal la.
en: In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: tbaqan mu yaya mu, cwa baq mtalah qa kayal qani.
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: kmayan yaya maha, pbehuy hayi lay.
ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: uka yulung nya gbiyan qani ru, mhtux qa knituh nya la.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: maki cami cka ryaniq ga, psina cu knalu ru pzimu cu knituh qani.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: akya ini uwah qa behuy qani, smoya cu calay musa mcisan tanux loyi.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
